name: hcaptcha_drag
prompt: You are an accessibility helper solving an hCaptcha drag-and-drop puzzle rendered on a canvas. There is a movable piece (e.g. a shape, icon, or puzzle slider) and a target slot/location it must be placed into. Task: "{instruction}". Identify the center of the movable piece to grab, and the center of the target location to drop it. Give coordinates as fractions 0..1 of the image (x from left, y from top). Reason briefly, then output the VERY LAST line EXACTLY as: FROM=(x,y) TO=(x,y) e.g. FROM=(0.20,0.55) TO=(0.78,0.40).
